free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of protons from neon
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
- Target is natural.
- Physical-form of target is gas. (in a brass cylinder
(7.5 cm diam.) with a slot (2.5 cm width) covered
with Al foil (9 um thick))
- Target-thickness: Pressure of 15.0 cmHg
Degraded by absorbers in step of 100 keV
Osaka 44-inch cyclotron
Ilford C-2 (200 um and 100 um thick) and Fuji
ET-6B (70 um thick)
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and proton
No information on sources of uncertainties
